entry.title: Re: How to get URL parameters in SAP Screen Personas
entry.content: This example is pure javascript and related to browser features. This shouldn't depend on Personas version. If there is a url address with provided url parameter, then it should work. When you have "https://.../sap/bc/personas" only, then there are no parameters to get.

entry.title: Re: API is used for logging into SuccessFactors- Can this...
entry.content:
Hi,

The screenshot does not mean much for me since it is not in English but the main idea is you need to configure Grandid as a Corporate IDP on IAS by exchanging metadata.xml files and you need to redirect your applications to the Grandid with Conditional Authentication. I have no experience with Grandid but the configuration steps shouldn't be much different than Azure. 

You can find the configuration details on SAP Help: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/corporate-identity-providers

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Suggestions: Career paths SAP HCM Consultant
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm new to the SAP Community. Since April, I've been self-learning SAP HCM through free SAP courses, Udemy, and YouTube tutorials. A friend has also helped me with training access, so I can practice. I chose HCM because I have a strong background in HR (6 years).

Today, I feel confident in the following areas:

  • Configuring enterprise structure, personnel structure, and organizational structure.
  • The PA (Personnel Administration) module, where I configured features, number ranges, master data infotypes, infogroups, and actions.
  • The TM (Time Management) module, where I configured key elements such as public holiday classes, holiday calendars, and work schedules, including personnel subarea groupings, daily work schedules, and period work schedules.
  • Lastly, in the PY (Payroll) module, I managed the configuration of payroll areas, pay scale structures, and custom wage types.

What do you suggest for the next step in my career? I'm currently not working, so I need to reenter the job market. I would appreciate any suggestions on improving my learning, where to find courses, or companies that invest in training and onboarding.

HCM (Human Capital Management) Careers Training

entry.title: Re: What is SAP Build Apps and how to develop a full-stack application on it?
entry.content:
Hello @Sudhir_Lenka 

I hope this email finds you well.

I recently came across your insightful blog post titled “What is SAP Build Apps and how to develop a full-stack application on it?” and found it extremely informative and engaging. I appreciate the detailed explanation and the practical approach you provided.

However, I have a few questions regarding database integration within SAP Build Apps. Specifically, I would like to understand how we can utilize databases in this context and what types of databases are supported. If you have any additional blog posts or resources that cover this topic, I would be grateful if you could share them with me.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Sundar

entry.title: User status not displaying in manage production operation app
entry.content:
In GUI have maintained the User status for operation. But its not displaying in Mange production operation app.

Any idea on it

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit internal numbering
entry.content:
Hi again,
Just fill in the old material number in the fields 'Product Number' field (PRODUCT) and in the 'Old Product Number' field (BISMT) in the load file. Choose internal numbering in the mapping part of the Migration Cockpit. 
SAP will then choose new numbers for your materials when you migrate them into S4 and you will have a reference to the old material number in BISMT. 
A prerequisite is of course that your material types in S4 allow internal numbering.

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content: You could try to use vanilla Javascript and manipulate "inputMode" attribute of the <INPUT> tags. When "inputMode=none" is set, then Software Keyboard will not be opened at all. However, such approach is not supported by SAP Screen Personas. Something could be changed and solution will stop work.

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine s...

After exporting in Excel, I've got following table:

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Based search models with Long Text support in S/4HANA on-premise
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing your insights! 

Custom CDS-based search models are currently allowed, see SAP note 3368930 - How to create CDS-based Search Models? (Enterprise Search)

entry.title: Re: Task type in parallel processing
entry.content:
@Sandra_Rossithank you for your reply.

As far as I know there is a system wide limit of processes that may be executed at one time. Regarding this limit I am wondering if it is possible to start as much dialog processes in parallel by using default syntax like STARTING NEW TASK to crash the system or if there is a fall back built in to prevent of this case. 

Furthermore I guess using dialog processes to implement parallelism won’t be such a good idea in case of longer running processes (e.g. 1 hour). Otherwise theses processes would block dialog user of logging in or using the system. Am I right?

In this case IN BACKGROUND UNIT could help out. 

BR

entry.title: Re-creating a Custom Field with the Same Name After Deletion in S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content: I have a question regarding the on-premise version of S/4HANA(2023). In the Custom Field app, is it possible to delete a field that has been extended and then re-create it with the same name? For instance, if the field type was incorrectly registered, I believe it would be necessary to re-register it.

entry.title: SAP TechEd Virtual October 8th - 9th
entry.content:
Devtoberfest will take a one week break as next week we have SAP TechEd Virtual on October 8th and 9th. https://www.sap.com/events/teched.html

We will post week three activities next Friday, October 11th and educational sessions for Devtoberfest will resume on Monday, October 14th.  

We look forward to seeing everyone online for TechEd next week. And this also gives you the chance to catch up on anything you missed from week 1 or week 2.

entry.title: Need help to obtain pay range reference role in SAP Story report
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are creating a SAP Story report using two reference roles. In our organization, each person has one reference role and there are few specified pay ranges and each pay range can have multiple reference roles. In our story report, we are trying to set up the query such that we pull the reference role for each individual and match it to the reference role for the pay grade to get the correct entry of data. Basically we need to pull 1) reference role for each individual and 2) reference role for pay grade in the same query. Now, while trying to find the reference role I am able to find and call the reference role of each employee. But I am not able to find the reference role for pay range (tried to click to see related tables from Pay Grade). 

Please see the query set up in the screenshots attached. Can someone help?

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Signavio Process governance with Service no...
entry.content:
Hi Srinivas,

thanks for the details. Calling a ServiceNow API via SAP Signavio Process Governance is possible using Script Tasks if the APIs are accessible via the Internet. Depending on the complexity of the integration, you can also consider trigger SAP Integration Suite or similar middleware solutions via SAP Signavio Process Governance and handle the connectivity to Service Now there. You can find an example here how SAP Integration Suite can be invoked within a approval workflow in SAP Signavio Process Governance 

If you need support, our Technical Services consultants can help on a project-level.

entry.title: Re: Aggregation in CDS Custom entity display in RAP
entry.content: We have run into a same problem .It seems that you cannot deploy a custom CDS entity as an ANalytical App. The aggregation works only if you deploy the application as an Analytical app.

Zunaira Karam

entry.title: Re: Need a way to access the contents of a table via a pr...
entry.content:
There are several methods to access SAP S/4HANA table contents:

In ABAP Programming, you can use Open SQL statements with necessary authorizations or in SAP HANA Studio, you can use SQL statements via SQL Console.
With SAP GUI, you should be able to use transaction codes like SE16N or SE11 with necessary authorizations or with OData Services, you can access table contents if exposed via an OData service.
For CDS Views, you can use CDS view to access table if included.

Please know, the "VIEW_AUTHORITY_CHECK" module checks authorization for specific actions. An "INVALID_ACTION" exception means the attempted action is not authorized.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024

Cheers to all!

entry.title: Multiple Values Displayed Instead of Single Value in SAS BO Report – Causes and Solutions
entry.content: On SAS BO, instead of displaying a single value, it shows multiple values. Why?

entry.title: Re: Scheduled Backup Failures on SAP HANA Tenant Database
entry.content:
To fix the issue, make sure your system has enough CPU, memory, and disk space for the backup and ensure your SAP HANA is updated to avoid software bugs.
Verify the Backup Settings, so check, if your backup settings are correct and review System Logs for error messages around the backup failure time.

Always monitor and test your backups to prevent data loss.

entry.title: Cases created by partner in Customer Insights reporting
entry.content:
In a cloud environment, most customers outsource services (e.g. projects or support-related services) to our partners. In such situations, a partner may liaise with SAP Support on behalf of their customers. With the next SAP for Me release in September 2024 a new enhancement has been added to the  ‘Customer Insights‘ dashboard reporting to identify cloud cases created by partner and sent to SAP for processing and cases processed by your support organization and finally sent to SAP.  

You now can gain more transparency and compare quantity, quality, processing times, subjects and all other details available in the section also for the partner cases.

As this information is not relevant to all customers, the visualization has not been included into the default view and you must activate it by adding relevant fields to the UI. This can easily be done by using the customization features.

Click on the customization wheel of the table and add from the list 2 new fields below:

  1. Filed “Reporter Type”: this field identifies whether the creator of the case is either the customer or a partner.
    •      If the case was created by an S-user ID from the customer the value “Customer” will appear.
    •      If the partner’s S-User ID was authorized to create cases on behalf of the customer “Partner – SPU” will be displayed. 
    •     If the case was created by an S-user ID that belongs to the customer but the reporter’s email domain belongs to a partner, “Partner – External” will be displayed.

  2. Field “Partner”: this field is only populated if the value of the Reporter Type field is either “Partner – SPU” or “Partner – External”. In this case you will see the name of the partner company or the email domain of the reporter’s email address.

  3. The new fields are available for Open, Closed and Sent Cases. You can sort and group the table content based on those fields. 

  4. Additionally using the “Adapt Filter” feature in the upper right corner above the graphs you can add the new filter “Reporter Type”.  By selecting the partner-related cases from the drop down menu all statistics graphs and the table will be adjusted accordingly.

Please use the ‘Feedback’ slider on the right edge of the page of the application to share with us your feedback on this new tool and help us to improve the reporting functionality in SAP for Me.

Stay updated by subscribing to this blog and visiting the SAP Support Portal / Customer Insights.

SAP for Me is made for you!

Related blogs: SAP for Me goes reporting  or all related blogs to ‘Customer Insights’ reporting dashboard.

entry.title: Starting My Journey in the SAP Community: A New Chapter
entry.content:
Hey everyone! I’m thrilled to become a part of this vibrant community. This space is perfect for sharing content, discussing ideas, and connecting with all of you. As I embark on this journey, I look forward to exploring topics that inspire growth and innovation in SAP.

I’m eager to share my insights and learn from your experiences as well. Let’s dive into meaningful conversations and build a supportive network together!

Best Regards

Mohan Das

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori launchpad - save as tile functionality
entry.content:
Your issue may be due to incorrect variant saving or tile linking.

You can try follow these steps for a fix:

1. After creating your report, click 'Save' then 'Save as Variant'. Give it a unique name and description.
2. When saving the app as a tile, select 'Link to Variant' and choose the correct variant.
3. After saving, click '...' on the tile and select 'Settings' to confirm it's linked to the right variant.
4. After these changes, refresh the launchpad to apply them. The correct data should now appear on the tile.

If problems persist, consider contacting SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Synchronisation of processes between SAP Signavio and ServiceNow
entry.content:
Hi Vladimir,
thank you for reaching out! I am part of SAP Signavio Product Management. Can you tell me more about what you try to achieve by having the process data in ServiceNow? We provide multiple APIs which could be leveraged for a custom integration. Feel free to send me a message: manuel.taechl@sap.com 

Best regards
Manuel

entry.title: Is there any variable to be changed to increase the timeout from 2min when Autosys triggers the BTP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Autosys(powershell script) scheduler is timing out in 2 minutes, but the iFlow keep running as long as it is required to complete the processing. While we are checking other possible options, we need to send a ticket to SAP soon to get where this is being configured, from what we know it is not iFlow level configuration.

We tried the following steps:

  • We tried running powershell script directly(skipping autosys), noticed it is getting timeout in 2 mins
  • We tried to invoking CPI endpoint directly from postman(skipping autosys and powershell), it is also getting timeout in 2 mins
  • We created scheduler iflow with in BTP and invoked main flow. There is no timeout happening in scheduler iFlow

 

Is there any variable to be changed to increase the timeout from 2min when Autosys triggers the BTP iflow?

Thanks,

Himani

entry.title: Re: How to restrict access to specific cost centers in SA...
entry.content:
As I know, in SAP S4 HANA, you should be able to limit access to certain cost centers using the K_CCA authorization object.

Please check below, if this works for you:

1. Open transaction PFCG (Role Maintenance).
2. Make a new role or modify an existing one.
3. Click 'Change Authorization Data' under the 'Authorizations' tab.
4. Select 'Manually' then 'Authorization' in the 'Authorization' tab.
5. Type 'K_CCA' in the 'Authorization' field and hit enter.
6. Specify the cost center or range to restrict in the 'Authorization Data' section.
7. Define the access type (display, change, etc.) in the 'Activity' field.
8. Save your changes.

Don't forget to assign the role to the appropriate users. They'll then only have access to the cost centers defined in the K_CCA authorization object.

Keep in mind, you must have the required authorizations to create or modify roles and authorizations in SAP.

entry.title: Re: Requirement to Data model in XSC envrionment but comb...
entry.content: It is not recommended to mix XSC and XSA models as SAP is moving towards XSA and XSC is considered as a legacy technology.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector Mac M1/M2/...
entry.content:
Firstly, you posted this in the wrong area. This is not a question.

And secondly, by following these instructions you are finally running the Cloud Connector INTEL x86_64 version on your M1/M2 macbook.
I do not recommend to do so because there is a native aarch64 version available meanwhile which should be preferred in this case.

entry.title: STRUST-ANAF_ETRANSPORT
entry.content:
Heloo guys,

Trying to make the connection between our sap system and the state institution ANAF (Etransport project), we followed their procedure: 

     In our sap system (SAP NETWEAVER 7.5 sp 28 / EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 sp21 with sap kernel 754 sp 200/ SSFLIB Version 1.850.40 / sapcryptolob version 8.5.50) from STRUST we activate “SSL server Standard” and from there we generate a certificate request in accordance with the procedure provided by ANAF.

     The resulting file was sent to ANAF and in response we received only the newly issued certificate, without any root or intermediate  CA's certificate.  When we try to import the received response into sap (STRUST-> select SSL Server Standard -> import certificate response) we get the following error "Issuer certificate missing in database:CN=MF Issue CA2, DC=AD, DC=FISC".

     According to sap note 508307 and many other docs, for this error, the certificate that should be imported, should be a concatenation between the response received from ANAF, the intermediate CA if needed and root CA .  But in our case we did not receive intermediate CA and root CA from ANAF. We tried to contact ANAF support to receive these certificates, but we did not receive any response.

     So in this case....the questions  are: Do you have any idea how and from where we can get the missing certificates? Any other way by which we can install the certificate received as a response without having a root CA?

Thank you

entry.title: i had installed the vs code but when i try to access the template wizard blow error was displayed
entry.content: i had installed the vs code but when i try to access the template wizard blow error was displayed. i am uninstall the extinction tools and uninstall the vs code and nodejs and reinstall all but the same error was coming why?

entry.title: Re: VKOA required in Display mode in PRD
entry.content:
Yes, In golden client (config Client) VKOA should generate Customizing TR to save the changes and same should be transported to QA then to PRD.

PRD should not be open for direct VKOA changes as that can create inconsitency in the environtments

entry.title: Re: Process Automation: Unattended agent is disconnected...
entry.content: Hi Stefanie, Since you've installed the Unattended Bot on your local system, please ensure it remains powered on to prevent automation execution failures. Regarding your second question, yes, you can run both attended and unattended bots on a remote machine. Let me know if you have any other questions.

Mr.Bang

entry.title: Can Azure AD be used in SAP Task Center config in place of SAP Identity Services for User Auth
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have to configure SAP task Center for my S4 system which is connected via Cloud Connector to subaccount where task center instance is running. I have gone through lot's of notes and Blog's but everywhere its written that we need to have & use SAP Cloud Identity Services as a prerequisite for SAP Task Center and the integration with the task providers. But in our case we use Custom identity Provider .i.e Azure AD. So we want to make use of Azure AD in place of SAP Cloud Identity Services. Guys please comments your views if it possible and if yes then how we can use it.

entry.title: Re: User status not displaying in manage production opera...
entry.content:
Hi 

In the worklist as well as on the detail screen of the Manage Production Orders and the Manage Production Operations app, you can display information on user-defined statuses for production orders and their operations.

Please go through the sap help it tell how display user statuses in Manage Production Operation app

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/34de0103497c4b80a7c7fbf6952ff971/40087d3502b94db38f2cdb14bc2eea70.html

Hope it will help you 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: My simple mobile desk which I can shift to wherever I want😅 and I use VS Code and SAP Business application studio for my development and I personally like the UI5 language assistant as it suggests attributes and detect any errors.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content:
I am not that good at keeping my desk clean at the office during the day.. but when I leave it will be clean 🙂

I love using VS Code for UI or middleware development but for the good old fashioned ABAP I still use the SAP logon with the classic theme. Off course I do use Eclipse for CDS or RAP development, but I did not yet make the move to Eclipse for my ABAP development.

entry.title: Re: Re-creating a Custom Field with the Same Name After D...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please refer the note I give a part of it . It is for cloud I guess it also can work for other 

3073680 - Error Message When Trying to Create a Custom Field with Same Name as Deleted Field - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Cause

It's not possible to create a new custom field using the same Identifier of a previously created and transported custom field, even if it's already deleted.

Resolution

You can use the same Label, but you must use a different Identifier for your new custom field.

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: XXX SAP Hana error: Number not defined for material t...
entry.content:
Hi 

It is suggested to reconfigure SSCUI 102282 Define Number Ranges for Each Material Type in current system in order to create product successfully.

See note for more details 

3487269 - Product could not be created due to error message M3318 - "Number & not defined for material type &" - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC New Certification Launch
entry.content:
Hi @wajahatrizvipk 
The C_GRCAC SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP Access is retired without a successor.

Please access our Certification Transformation site. There you find all the details on the new SAP Certification program. Use the Certification Recommendation documentation and learn how your certification will be affected with the upcoming SAP Certification program changes and what you will need to do to stay certified. 

If your SAP Certification will expire without a recommended alternative:
Explore the SAP Certification portfolio to continue developing the right skills for your role.
Find learning solutions to validate your SAP knowledge, stay relevant, and ensure your certification remain current beyond March 31, 2025.

Kind regards
Margit

Margit

entry.title: Re: SA Data action performance
entry.content:
Hi @MontseMM 

If the data action takes 8-10 minutes, the main resource consumer is nested FOREACH & FOR iteration. To reduce the execution time, we need to eliminate the FOREACH and FOR iterations in your script.

FOREACH & FOR iteration is necessary because of the script below which is to write calculation results for the period [d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate] ~ [d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualEndDate].

  • ELSE
    DATA([d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", [d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate]), [d/Measure] = "Amount" ....)
    = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measure] = "Amount", [d/Date] = #IMPORTEINI, ...)
    * RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measure] = "Porcentaje", [d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", [d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate]), ....)

Unfortunately, I cannot provide an exact script, but I hope you can find a way to get your expected result without FOREACH & FOR iteration from the script below.

  •  
    IF(YEAR([d/Date]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Date])) - (YEAR([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate])) >= 0
    AND
      (YEAR([d/Date]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Date])) - (YEAR([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualEndDate]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualEndDate])) <= 0 THEN
     
    DATA([d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", [d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate]), [d/Measure] = "Amount" ....)
    = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measure] = "Amount", [d/Date] = #IMPORTEINI,  ...)
    * RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measure] = "Porcentaje", [d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", [d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate]), ....)
     
    ENDIF
IF(YEAR([d/Date]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Date])) - (YEAR([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualStartDate])) >= 0
	AND
  (YEAR([d/Date]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Date])) - (YEAR([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualEndDate]) * 12 + MONTH([d/Elemento_PEP].[p/ActualEndDate])) <= 0 THEN
	
DATA([d/Measure] = "Amount" ....)
= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measure] = "Amount", [d/Date] = #IMPORTEINI,  ...)
* RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measure] = "Porcentaje",....)	

ENDIF

To apply the above script, the overall script should be modified to get your expected result.  

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

Moonjun

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020
entry.content: Does Crystal Reports 2020 have an automated refresh option & can you schedule a mail sending option?

entry.title: Re: Insert text type and content in notes tab in Freight...
entry.content:
Hello @MuditJain 

I think your best bet is /SCMTMS/CL_TXC_HELPER class (note 3146279 - Helper for Notes : Text Collection CRUD operations)

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP CUSTOMER CHECKOUT MANAGER ARTICLES UPDATE FROM SA...
entry.content:
And can you explain me how to do the manual update in the API ?

You need to use our documentation and there swagger is mentioned. You can use the API's mentioned there for article updates.

There is also a training in Dubai in November 2025. You can also attend that to learn about all these.
Also kindly close this question so that other questions are asked in a different posting.

entry.title: Re: max users in a team
entry.content:
@sevans 

I do not think there is a limit on how many users can be assigned to a Team but may be it could be something to do with license assignment within the team.

Nikhil

entry.title: May i know the difference between ECC and S/4 HANA from authorization point of view.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please let us know the major differences between ECC and S4 HANA Security from authorization point of view?

I tried to find out the differences but no luck. Your response will be appreciated.

Regards,

Srinu Nelli

SAP Security & GRC Consultant

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Advanced Formula "...
entry.content:
@guenay

As you said that the model is a copy from existing model, I would suggest that you use cross model daat copy, its very efficient in terms of performance compared to LINK formula.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP CUSTOMER CHECKOUT MANAGER ARTICLES UPDATE FROM SA...
entry.content: Thank you Bikash.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
Re: About users with profile SAP_ALL
entry.content: Question 3: the note 2894909 only applies from 01S_640 to 01U_731 (https://me.sap.com/notes/2894909/E). Contact the SAP support if you feel that there's still a bug in 01V.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4Hana Go-live readiness assessment
entry.content: https://go.support.sap.com/roadmapviewer/#/group/3DAE6BF3-610C-4FC5-83E9-D7595854F5F8/roadmapContentPage/SUITEONPREMAGL:901B0E6D3F441EE8BFD346FD6D713863

entry.title: Newbie
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is David Ogundalu, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I have a background in business analysis, data management, and project management, with over 5 years of experience in the industry. I’m passionate about using technology to drive business transformation and efficiency.

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in supply chain management and finance. These areas have always been of great interest to me as I believe SAP offers transformative solutions that can optimize operations and drive growth.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because it will allow me to further my career by integrating SAP’s innovative solutions into real-world business applications and helping organizations achieve better efficiency.

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in technology, business transformation, and AI. I believe networking is an essential part of growth, and I’m eager to exchange ideas and insights.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best regards,
David Ogundalu

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
Re: About users with profile SAP_ALL
entry.content: I feel that 26 or 34 users with SAP_ALL is way too much. Only keep it to 1 user but activate this user only when there's a big problem. See this note/blog post: https://me.sap.com/notes/2548064/E. You may ask Frank B. in the discussion.

entry.title: Re: How to search only in a specific community
entry.content: Hilarious! 🙂 But also a disgrace that it is still not possible to only search within a specifc managed tag

entry.title: Re: Export table from SAC to Excel - how to keep cells ba...
entry.content:
@Kristina33 

That is the expected behaviour. 

  • Formatting (such as cell color, font styles, and so on) will not be exported.

This is clearly mentioned in the help documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/ff5f1e052b5e400da990dad8408604da.html#general-considerations-before-you-export-data

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Convert internal table to CSV format
entry.content: I have another issue with the FM SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT.  Everything works fine with this when we pass internal table as input but when we have uuid fields in the internal table, the output values do not appear properly. It comes as #﬍㻿必#쪞嗺賻 . Can anyone help here?

entry.title: Re: REFX Leasing - Special Ledger for closing processes in REFX Leasing

entry.title: Re: REFX Leasing - Special Ledger for closing processes in REFX Leasing

entry.title: Re: Comparison of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (SAC edition) vs. SAC add-in for Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
@SteffenHeine 

When storing SAC Excel Add-in templates on tenant, how would the logon work when opening the template from tenant. Will it sign in automatically?

Also How do we handle lifecycle transports for these stored templates. Can we transport or we need to store on the tenants separately between Dev and QA/prod. Also in case of transports will the tenant url switch automatically when Add-in file is opened from target tenant.

Kindly clarify as I could not find anything on Help documentation.

Regards

Nikhil

entry.title: THIRD PARTY SALES - ACCOUNT ASSIGNMENT CATEGORY X
entry.content:
Hi,

Trying to do a Goods Receipt for a Third Party PO with Acct Assgnment X and Item Category S. The Standard settings with Goods Receipt enabled has been done in SPRO for the Account Assignment Category X.

Image of the Item Category settings also below. However, I am unable to GRN this PO, Vendor account-Purchasing allows GRN, GR indicator is enabled on PO. Why can't we do a statistical Goods Receipt?

Error in MIGO is the standard ''No provision has been made for GR''

 

#ThirdPartySales #Account Assignment Category X #SAPMM

entry.title: Re: REFX Leasing - Special Ledger for closing processes in REFX Leasing
entry.content: I have no other information as shown in SAP Note 2660070. Moreover, this topic is related to the closing procedures in FI. Therefore I cannot comment on the future plans regarding this functionality. Best regards, Franz.

entry.title: Problem with request body mapper and how to write the code
entry.content:
Hi,

I built and app and it works perfect on webb and in the beginning also on an Android tablet. Suddenly the functions that made calls to oData API stopped working on all tablets at the same time. I have not been able to solve this so now I decided to change the data sources to REST api instead since they have worked perfect. Problem is that when I for example wants to make a call and GET records sending conditions I cant seem to write the correct code in the request body mapper. I get all records evry time when i test. For example a simple call with just one filter condition like this:

ENCODE_JSON({ "conditions": [ { "field": "U_DocEntry", "operator": "=", "value": 478 } ]}) OR

ENCODE_JSON({"U_DocEntry":478})

I make calls to SAP Business one service layer and in this case it is a UDT(own table). Can someone please tell me what I am doing wrong? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: BADI PRICING_AUTHORITY_CHECK_UI Implementation
entry.content: Hi Geoff, I would like to understand how you have implemented as I do have similar kind of requirement

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Formula outside of Planning Area changing
entry.content:
Hi,

Not sure of the origin of the issue you are facing, but I guess you can quickly fix it using OFFSET excel function and referring to the cell itself, same row, and a negative value to capture a column on the left.

Example to capture the total of 12 months (from column "K" to column "V"), implement in column "Y" the following formula (I am using row 5 as example):

=SUM(OFFSET(Y5;0;-14):OFFSET(Y5;0;-2))

BR

entry.title: Re: The Digital Transformation of Healthcare
entry.content: The article emphasizes the rapid digital transformation in healthcare, especially during the pandemic, and it brings to mind the growing importance of remote patient monitoring. By allowing healthcare providers to track patients' conditions in real-time, remote patient monitoring has proven invaluable in reducing the need for hospital visits. This shift has been supported by advances in healthcare software development, enabling more efficient and personalized care. A well-integrated remote patient monitoring software enhances these capabilities, ensuring continuous care and better patient outcomes.

entry.title: Re: Insert text type and content in notes tab in Freight...
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn

Thank you for your response. The create method of this class does not seem to work when there no TEXTCOLLECTION data for a freight order i.e. there in no data in TEXTCOLLECTION node in BO /SCMTMS/TOR for a freight order. Can you please suggest some solution regarding it.

Thanks 
Mudit Jain

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content:
Happy Devtoberfest, Techtoberfest! 

My current setup:

I'm not fan of multiple monitors but I like the multiple desktop feature of the MacOS. I can easily switch between desktops instead of moving my head between monitors 😂

And, my favorite VSCode Extension is SAP Business Application Studio toolkit!

entry.title: Access Restriction for TPM60 Transaction
entry.content:
Hi,
I got a request to restrict TPM60 transaction access only to allow test run. I've limited all the authorizations to display only but still when we execute it without test run it is updating the NPV's. Can any one help me on how to restrict the access only to allow for test run.
Thank you in advance.
Best Regards,
Sumanth P
